name: genome/adapter-prune
description: Prune unused LoRA adapters to reclaim disk space. Removes adapters not used since the specified cutoff date. Supports dry-run mode to preview what would be deleted.

params.name: unusedSince
params.description: Prune adapters unused since this duration (e.g., '30d', '7d', '90d'). Default: '30d'

params.name: dryRun
params.description: Preview what would be pruned without actually deleting (default: true for safety)

params.name: personaId
params.description: Only prune adapters for a specific persona

params.name: domain
params.description: Only prune adapters for a specific domain

params.name: keepLatest
params.description: Always keep the N most recent adapters per domain regardless of age (default: 1)

results.name: prunedCount
results.description: Number of adapters pruned (or would be pruned in dry-run)

results.name: reclaimedMB
results.description: Disk space reclaimed (or would be reclaimed) in megabytes

results.name: prunedAdapters
results.description: List of pruned adapter names with sizes

results.name: isDryRun
results.description: Whether this was a dry-run (no actual deletion)

examples.description: Preview pruning adapters unused for 30 days
